seo.title: Rodriguez Landscaping & Lawn Service | Dallas, TX | (214) 778-7897
seo.description: Expert landscaping and lawn care in Dallas, TX. From mowing to hardscaping, trust Rodriguez Landscaping for reliable, quality service. Call (214) 778-7897.

hero.headline: Transform Your Yard with Professional Lawn Care
hero.subheadline: Reliable, affordable landscaping services tailored to your Dallas home.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Lawn Maintenance
featureSections.body: From weekly mowing to seasonal cleanups, we keep your yard looking its best all year. Our team uses top-grade equipment and eco-friendly practices.
featureSections.cardBody: Regular care that saves you time and keeps your curb appeal high.

featureSections.title: Custom Patios, Walkways & More
featureSections.body: Add value and beauty to your property with custom stonework, pavers, and retaining walls. We design and build outdoor living spaces you'll love.
featureSections.cardBody: Durable, beautiful installations that transform your backyard into an oasis.

whyChooseUs.title: Local Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: We know Dallas soil, climate, and plants. Your lawn gets care that's tailored to our region.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Punctual
whyChooseUs.description: We show up on time, every time. No surprises, just consistent service you can count on.

whyChooseUs.title: Affordable Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: Quality landscaping doesn't have to break the bank. We offer competitive rates with no hidden fees.

whyChooseUs.title: Eco-Friendly Practices
whyChooseUs.description: We use sustainable methods and products to keep your yard green and the planet cleaner.

testimonials.quote: Rodriguez transformed our overgrown yard into a beautiful space. They were professional, on time, and the price was fair. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Maria G.

testimonials.quote: We've been using them for two years now. Our lawn has never looked better. The team is friendly and always goes the extra mile.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: They built a stunning patio for us. The craftsmanship is top-notch and they completed the project ahead of schedule. Five stars!
testimonials.author: Lisa M.

cta.headline: Ready for a Greener, More Beautiful Yard?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation quote.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of landscaping and lawn care services to keep your Dallas property looking its best. From routine maintenance to custom hardscaping, our team delivers quality and reliability.

services.title: Lawn Mowing & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Regular mowing, edging, and trimming to keep your lawn healthy and neat.
services.longDescription: Our lawn maintenance program covers weekly or bi-weekly mowing, precise edging along walkways and driveways, and trimming around trees and fences. We also blow off clippings and debris for a clean finish. With flexible scheduling and eco-friendly practices, your lawn will thrive.

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your lawn size, grass type, and condition to create a maintenance plan.

process.title: Mowing & Edging
process.description: Our crew mows at the optimal height and edges for sharp lines.

process.title: Cleanup
process.description: We blow clippings off hard surfaces and remove debris for a polished look.

faqs.question: How often should I mow my lawn?
faqs.answer: Typically once a week during the growing season. We'll adjust based on weather and grass growth.

faqs.question: Do you provide the equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we bring all necessary mowers, trimmers, and blowers. No need for you to store anything.

services.title: Landscape Design & Installation
services.shortDescription: Custom landscape designs including plants, trees, and flower beds.
services.longDescription: Our design team works with you to create a landscape that reflects your style and fits your property. We handle everything from plant selection to installation, including trees, shrubs, perennials, and mulch. We focus on drought-tolerant and native plants for low-maintenance beauty.
benefits: Personalized design tailored to your taste

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision, budget, and site conditions.

process.title: Design Plan
process.description: We create a detailed layout with plant choices and hardscape elements.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team brings the design to life with precise planting and finishing touches.

faqs.question: How long does a typical installation take?
faqs.answer: Depending on the scope, most projects are completed in 1-3 days.

faqs.question: Do you offer maintenance for new plantings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer follow-up care to ensure your plants establish well.

services.title: Hardscaping: Patios & Walkways
services.shortDescription: Beautiful stone patios, walkways, and retaining walls for outdoor living.
services.longDescription: Enhance your outdoor space with custom hardscaping. We specialize in paver patios, natural stone walkways, retaining walls, and outdoor kitchens. Our skilled masons ensure durable, level installations that withstand Dallas weather. From modern to rustic, we bring your vision to life.

process.title: Design & Material Selection
process.description: We help you choose pavers, stones, and layout to match your home.

process.title: Site Preparation
process.description: We excavate, grade, and lay a solid base for stability.

process.title: Installation & Sealing
process.description: Our team installs the hardscape and applies sealant for protection.

faqs.question: How long does a patio installation take?
faqs.answer: A typical patio takes 2-5 days depending on size and complexity.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranties on hardscaping?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a workmanship warranty on all installations.

services.title: Seasonal Cleanup & Mulching
services.shortDescription: Spring and fall cleanups, leaf removal, and fresh mulch application.
services.longDescription: Keep your yard tidy through the seasons with our comprehensive cleanup services. We remove leaves, debris, and dead plants, then trim back overgrowth. Our mulching service suppresses weeds, retains moisture, and gives beds a polished look. We use premium hardwood or colored mulch.
benefits: Prepares your yard for each season

process.title: Debris Removal
process.description: We rake leaves, clear flower beds, and haul away yard waste.

process.title: Pruning & Trimming
process.description: We trim shrubs, trees, and perennials for healthy growth.

process.title: Mulch Application
process.description: We spread fresh mulch evenly around beds and trees.

faqs.question: What type of mulch do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer hardwood, cedar, and colored mulches. You can choose your preference.

faqs.question: Do you remove the old mulch first?
faqs.answer: We typically top-dress over existing mulch unless it's heavily compacted; we can remove if needed.

about.headline: Dallas' Trusted Landscaping Partner
about.mission: To provide exceptional landscaping services that enhance the beauty and value of Dallas homes through reliable, affordable, and eco-friendly care.
story: Rodriguez Landscaping & Lawn service was founded with a simple mission: bring professional, reliable lawn care to Dallas neighborhoods. Starting with just a mower and a truck, our founder, Carlos Rodriguez, built a reputation for hard work and attention to detail. Over the years, we've grown into a full-service landscaping company serving homeowners across the city.

Today, our team of skilled landscapers and designers is committed to the same values that started it all: honesty, quality, and customer satisfaction. Whether it's a weekly mow or a complete landscape transformation, we treat every yard as if it were our own.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, and we stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use the best materials and techniques for lasting results.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your property and your time with the utmost respect.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve and be part of the Dallas community.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Quote Today
contact.subheadline: Ready to transform your yard? Reach out and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
